queries.question: Which feature value of features is common across all communities?
queries.sql: SELECT Features.feature_value  from Communities_Features join Features on Communities_Features.feature_id = Features.feature_id join Communities on Communities_Features.community_id = Communities.community_id   GROUP BY Communities_Features.feature_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Communities_Features.community_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Communities)

queries.question: What feature values are associated with each community?
queries.sql: select communities.community_name , features.feature_value from Communities_Features join Features on Communities_Features.feature_id = Features.feature_id join Communities on Communities_Features.community_id = Communities.community_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?community_name ?feature_value WHERE {
  ?communities_features a :Communities_Features .
  ?features a :Features .
  ?communities_features p:hasFeatures ?features .
  ?communities a :Communities .
  ?communities_features p:hasCommunities ?communities .
  ?communities p:community_name ?community_name .
  ?features p:feature_value ?feature_value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What feature values are associated with each community?
